fieldValues.value: ExactTypeRef entries in DocumentView.rootTypeRefs must resolve in the Package

When DocumentView.rootTypeRefs is present and non-empty, each ExactTypeRef entry MUST resolve to a Type that exists in the Package (the union of all packages in scope per packageRef/packageRefs; matched by both typeId and typeVersion). An entry that does not resolve MUST produce a diagnostic and MUST NOT be used for Container matching.
